1.title: Number of running EC2 instances (ASG)
1.query:
timeseries running = avg(dt.cloud.aws.asg.running, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.auto_scaling_group }
| fieldsAdd auto_scaling_group_name = entityName(dt.entity.auto_scaling_group)
| sort arrayAvg(running) desc
| limit 10

2.title: Number of stopped EC2 instances (ASG)
2.query:
timeseries stopped = avg(dt.cloud.aws.asg.stopped, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.auto_scaling_group }
| fieldsAdd auto_scaling_group_name = entityName(dt.entity.auto_scaling_group)
| sort arrayAvg(stopped) desc
| limit 10

3.title: Number of terminated EC2 instances (ASG)
3.query:
timeseries terminated = avg(dt.cloud.aws.asg.terminated, rollup: avg)
| sort arrayAvg(terminated) desc
| limit 10

5.title: Number of running EC2 instances (AZ)
5.query:
timeseries running = avg(dt.cloud.aws.az.running, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_availability_zone }
| fieldsAdd aws_availability_zone_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_availability_zone)
| sort arrayAvg(running) desc
| limit 10

6.title: Number of stopped EC2 instances (AZ)
6.query:
timeseries stopped = avg(dt.cloud.aws.az.stopped, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_availability_zone }
| fieldsAdd aws_availability_zone_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_availability_zone)
| sort arrayAvg(stopped) desc
| limit 10

7.title: Number of terminated EC2 instances (AZ)
7.query:
timeseries terminated = avg(dt.cloud.aws.az.terminated, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_availability_zone }
| fieldsAdd aws_availability_zone_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_availability_zone)
| sort arrayAvg(terminated) desc
| limit 10

8.title: EC2 CPU usage %
8.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ec2.cpu.usage, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ec2_instance }
| fieldsAdd ec2_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.ec2_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 10

9.title: EC2 network data received rate
9.query:
timeseries rx = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ec2.net.rx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ec2_instance }
| fieldsAdd ec2_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.ec2_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(rx) desc
| limit 10

10.title: EC2 network data transmitted rate
10.query:
timeseries tx = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ec2.net.tx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ec2_instance }
| fieldsAdd ec2_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.ec2_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(tx) desc
| limit 10

11.title: EC2 instance storage read IOPS
11.query:
timeseries read_ops = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ec2.disk.read_ops, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ec2_instance }
| fieldsAdd ec2_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.ec2_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(read_ops) desc
| limit 10

12.title: EC2 instance storage read rate
12.query:
timeseries read_rate = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ec2.disk.read_rate, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ec2_instance }
| fieldsAdd ec2_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.ec2_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(read_rate) desc
| limit 10

13.title: EC2 instance storage write IOPS
13.query:
timeseries write_ops = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ec2.disk.write_ops, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ec2_instance }
| fieldsAdd ec2_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.ec2_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(write_ops) desc
| limit 10

14.title: EC2 instance storage write rate
14.query:
timeseries write_rate = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ec2.disk.write_rate, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ec2_instance }
| fieldsAdd ec2_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.ec2_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(write_rate) desc
